title: Journey to the West: Legends of the Monkey King
titleEnglish: Journey to the West: Legends of the Monkey King
synopsis: Sun Wukong, who was born from a magic stone, has been imprisoned underneath a mountain for five centuries for his mischief in the heavens. One day, the Diety Guanyin told Wukong that the Monk Tangsen will set him free, and Wukong will join him on a pilgrimage from China to India. The next day, Xuanzang came and set him free, and the two started their Journey to the west. Along the way, they meet two new friends, Zhu Bajie and the Hermit Sha Wujing who joins them on the journey; together, they face many dangers and evil creatures and sorcerers and learn to get along. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Way of Choices
synopsis: Chen Changsheng, a young man of mysterious origins, is prophesied to die before the age of twenty due to his unique constitution. Determined to defy fate, he follows his master’s orders and travels to the Divine Capital of the human realm with a marriage contract in hand. His goal is to win first place in the highest-level Grand Imperial Examination, thereby earning the right to enter the Tomb of Heavenly Books to study the steles and seek a way to extend his life. In the Divine Capital, the marriage contract draws him into complex power struggles involving the Saintess Xu Yourong. Soon, an even greater crisis emerges: the forces of the demon race begin stirring in secret, plotting to overthrow the human race. Relying on his vast knowledge, Chen Changsheng makes his debut at the Ivy Banquet, then goes on to claim first place in the Grand Imperial Examination, gaining entry to the Tomb of Heavenly Books. There, he not only comprehends profound cultivation techniques but also uncovers a

title: AOTU Shijie
synopsis: A god created AOTU World and established the 7 Oracles to rule it on behalf of this god. The poor and rich, enslaved and free, suffering and happiness, destruction and birth: every status is ordained by God. Mortals can only accept, but cannot resist. However, God has given his people the opportunity to change their fate through "AOTU Contest." The contestants use their unique "ability" gifted by the Contest System and inbate wisdom and courage in hopes of winning the competition and becoming the world's ruler.

title: One Way or Another
synopsis: The invincible young man faced the raging wind and waves with a pounding heart and infinite possibilities. Across the continent under the sky, a ray of light pierced the heavens from the swordmaster of Qingshan Mountain! After Grandmaster Jing Yang ascended, the young man Jiu Jing left his mountain home to head for Gushan Mountain. Famed for his handsome looks and lazy attitude, Jiu Jing took a different path for his cultivation, always looking for shortcuts. There were many suspicious signs behind Jing Yang's ascension. What could be hiding in the fog that surround the peaks of Qingshan Mountain? (Source: Bilibili, translated)

Kiki to Lara no Hanzel to Gretel

synopsis: This series of OVA depicts Kitty White and her companions as the protagonists of several fairy tales. This entry contains: 1. Kiki to Lara no Hanzel to Gretel (キキとララのヘンゼルとグレーテル) - July 21, 1993 2. Hello Kitty no Shirayuki-hime (ハローキティのしらゆきひめ) - July 21, 1993 3. Kero Kero Keroppi no Gulliver no Bouken (けろけろけろっぴのガリバーの冒険) - August 21, 1993 4. Hello Kitty no Alps no Shoujo Heidi (ハローキティのアルプスの少女ハイジ) - August 21, 1993 5. Hello Kitty no Kaguya-hime (ハローキティのかぐや姫) - September 21, 1993 6. Ahiru no Pekkle no Aladdin to Mahou no Lamp (アヒルのペックルのアラジンと魔法のランプ)- September 21, 1993 7. Ahiru no Pekkle no Sinbad no Bouken (アヒルのペックルのシンドバッドの冒険) - October 21, 1993 8. Hello Kitty no Fushigi no Kuni no Alice (ハローキティの不思議の国のアリス) - November 21, 1993 9. Kero Kero Keroppi no Robin Hood (けろけろけろっぴのロビンフッド) - January 21, 1994 10. Hello Kitty no Alps no Shoujo Heidi Ⅱ - Clara to no deai (ハローキティのアルプスの少女ハイジⅡ -クララとの出会い-) - March 21, 1994 11. Hello Kitty no Shoukoujo (ハローキティの小公女) - July 21, 1994

title: Fuusen Shoujo Temple-chan
titleNative: 風船少女テンプルちゃん
synopsis: Temple is a lovely girl who enjoys music. One day she climbs on board a balloon and is excited by the aerial journey, until she realizes she's drifting away from her home. While she's distraught, she is encouraged by a drummer boy and animals who play music for her and help her find her way back home. (Source: Tatsunoko)

title: Kaizoku Ouji
synopsis: Kid was brought up on a small island which floats on the Carribean Sea. He lives a pleasant life with many animals as his companions. However, this changes when he learns that his dying father is not his real father. Before he passes away, his foster father reveals to Kid that his real father is actually Captain Morgan, the pirate who rules the seven seas. Kid decides to set off in search of his real father, only to learn about his death. Other pirates began to hunger for the title of ruler, one of them being the notorious pirate Tiger Hook. In order to protect the seas, Kid became the pirate king of his father's ship. (Source: Anime News Network)
